events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.CfnAb: These are custom parameters to be used when the target is a Amazon Redshift cluster to invoke the Amazon Redshift Data API ExecuteStatement based on EventBridge events.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.Datab.Description: The name of the database. Required when authenticating using temporary credentials.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.DbUse.Description: The database user name. Required when authenticating using temporary credentials.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.Secre.Description: The name or ARN of the secret that enables access to the database. Required when authenticating using AWS Secrets Manager.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.Sql.Description: The SQL statement text to run.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.State.Description: The name of the SQL statement. You can name the SQL statement when you create it to identify the query.

events.rule.redshiftdataparameters.WithE.Description: Indicates whether to send an event back to EventBridge after the SQL statement runs.
